detaileddescription.para: This file contains the static initialization file for the Xilinx Montgomery Multiplier (Mmult) core.
This file contains the linux support for the driver associated with the Xilinx HDCP22 Montgomery Multiplier (Mmult) core.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx HDCP22 Montgomery Multiplier (Mmult) core.
This is the main header file for the Xilinx HDCP 2.2 Montgomery Multiplier device driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 MH 12/07/15 Initial release. 1.01 MH 08/04/16 Added 64 bit address support.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 MH 12/07/15 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 MH 10/01/15 Initial release.
